parameters.url: ={{ 'https://www.bienici.com/realEstateAds.json?filters=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify({ size: 24, from: 0, filterType: 'rent', propertyType: ['house','flat'], maxPrice: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.prix_max_cc, minRooms: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.pieces_min, maxRooms: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.pieces_max, minArea: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.surface_min_m2, maxArea: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.surface_max_m2, page: 1, sortBy: 'relevance', sortOrder: 'desc', onTheMarket: [true], mapMode: 'enabled', newProperty: false, blurInfoType: ['disk','exact'], zoneIdsByTypes: { zoneIds: ($('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.zone_ids_bienici || '-145996,-29339,-78150,-75588,-54517').split(',').map(z => z.trim()).filter(Boolean) } })) + '&extensionType=extendedIfNoResult&enableGoogleStructuredDataAggregates=true&leadingCount=2&id=69ac364ff3e55c00b4185c9f' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { municipalities: [{ code: '35238', postcode: '35000' }], searchRadiusInKm: 50, maxRent: $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json.prix_max_cc, typologyCodes: ['T2','T3'], productGuids: ['712f4424-7590-4912-8ed8-f192b26557f8'] } }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const c = $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json; const minB = Math.max(0, (c.pieces_min || 2) - 1); const maxB = Math.max(0, (c.pieces_max || 3) - 1); let beds = ''; for (let i = minB; i <= maxB; i++) beds += '&nbBedrooms%5B%5D=' + i; return 'https://www.giboire.com/recherche-location/appartement_maison/?searchBy=default&address%5B%5D=35&priceMax=' + (c.prix_max_cc || 700) + '&livingSurfaceMin=' + (c.surface_min_m2 || 35) + '&livingSurfaceMax=' + (c.surface_max_m2 || 75) + beds + '&transactionType%5B%5D=Location&searchBy=default'; })() }}
